title: Heatstroke 中暑处理
scene: Tim在夏天户外运动时感到头晕恶心，朋友帮他人阴凉处休息。

lines.en: Sam, I feel dizzy. My head hurts.
Tim, your face is really red! Let us get out of the sun.
lines.zh: Tim，你脸好红！我们离开太阳底下。

lines.en: I feel sick. I think I need to sit down.
lines.zh: 我想吐。我觉得需要坐下。

lines.en: Come to the shade under the tree. Sit here.
I am so thirsty. Do you have any water?
Yes, drink slowly. Do not drink too fast.
Thanks. I think I played too long in the sun.
lines.zh: 谢谢。我想是太阳下玩太久了。

lines.en: You might have a heatstroke. Let me wet this towel.
lines.zh: 你可能中暑了。我把毛巾弄湿。

lines.en: That feels better on my forehead.
Rest here. I will go get some help from the nurse.
lines.zh: 在这里休息。我去叫校医来帮忙。
